title: Add call graph relationships to context for planning

phases.title: Add callGraph field to ProjectContext interface

tasks.title: Add CallGraphNode and CallGraphEdge types
tasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for call graph nodes (critical functions) and edges (caller -> callee relationships)

tasks.title: Add callGraph field to ProjectContext interface
tasks.description: Add callGraph array field to ProjectContext containing nodes (critical functions) and edges (relationships)
tasks.verification: Interface includes callGraph field with proper typing

tasks.title: Create extractCallGraph method
tasks.description: New private method that traverses state.graph.edges to build call relationships between critical functions. Filter to only include edges where both source and target are in criticalFunctions list.
tasks.verification: Method returns CallGraph with nodes and edges

tasks.title: Add circular dependency detection
tasks.description: Detect and flag circular call chains (A calls B calls C calls A) in the call graph
tasks.verification: Circular chains are identified and marked

tasks.title: Update buildContext to include callGraph
tasks.description: Add callGraph: this.extractCallGraph(state, criticalFunctions) to the buildContext return object

phases.title: Add call graph to Markdown output

tasks.title: Update generateMarkdown with call graph section
tasks.description: Add '## Call Graph Relationships' section to Markdown output showing function-to-function calls, dependency chains, and circular dependencies

tasks.title: Run context generator tests
tasks.description: Verify existing tests pass and new call graph functionality works correctly

tasks.title: Validate output format
tasks.description: Generate context for test project and verify callGraph structure matches expected format
tasks.verification: JSON structure valid, edges reference valid nodes
